dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: This episode contains depictions of violence that may be upsetting for some readers.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: It is a Dokkaebi!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As the creature sprung into view.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A Dokkaebi is a mythical creature in Korean culture that is similar to a goblin.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I don't know why that sentence popped into my head at that moment.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The subway came to a halt, and the entire cabin grew dark.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: No way. Subways stop all the time.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The opening lines of a very familiar story kept crossing my mind.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But it doesn't make any sense. There's no way.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: A Dokkaebi?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Sorry?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Realistically speaking, there was no way this could be true. It was completely impossible, but...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Horns. A small creature was floating midair, wearing a downy garment. Malicious, peculiar, too innocent to be an angel, too malicious to be a fairy, too innocent to be a devil.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What is that?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: N-No way... This is...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: So we called it a "Dokkaebi."

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: At that moment, fiction and reality overlapped.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What is that thing saying? Is this augmented reality or something?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ew, it is so ugly!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: No one knew what was going on... except me.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: That thing is definitely a "Dokkaebi." It was the Dokkaebi that appeared in the opening paragraph of TWSA. This creature heralded the tragedy that carried on for thousands of chapters throughout [Three Ways to Survive the Apocalypse]. Impossible. How can this be...?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: That very same Dokkaebi was now right in front of me. I think it is speaking Spanish. Should I try talking to it?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You don't even know what that thing is. Are you going to ask it to lend you money? Or whatever... "Puede" (Help us right now).

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: W-Well, no. But...

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: Testing, testing. Can everyone hear me? Gosh, the language patch was malfunctioning for a bit.

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: Can everyone hear me now?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, what do you think you're doing?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Pardon?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Are you filming a movie? I have to go to my audition.

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: Oh, an audition at this hour, huh? Haha.

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: I guess I should have done more research. They told me I would have the most customers if we put up the paywall at around 7 PM.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What? What on earth are you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: Okay, everyone, please calm down. Why don't you take a seat and listen? I have something very important to tell you all!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What is it? Just start the train already!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You can't do this without our consent! How are you going to compensate for this?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Mommy, what is that? Is it a cartoon?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I am certain. I know exactly how this story goes.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I have to stop them, but how?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Sangah, don't move.

dialogue.speaker: Sangah
dialogue.line: Sorry?

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: Haha, it sure is noisy here, isn't it? I told you to be quiet!

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: Huh? We're not filming a movie. This isn't a dream, or a novel, and it certainly isn't the reality that you are all familiar with! Do you understand?!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I hated to admit it, but this was real.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My doubt and disbelief slowly faded away.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As I watched the floor quickly become painted in blood.

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: All of you have had quite a cushy life until now, haven't you?

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: You were free to breathe, eat, excrete, and reproduce without paying the costs! Ha!

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: You've all been enjoying privileged lives, but it is all over now.

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: Nothing is free in life, isn't that right?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Is it money you want?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Sangah, isn't that Mr. Han from the finance team? He was employed because of his connections.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
dialogue.line: Yes. If it is money you're after, I'll give you as much as you want. And just so you know, this is what I do.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
dialogue.line: How much do you need? A million? Or two million perhaps?

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: Hmm, so you're offering me your money?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
dialogue.line: I'll give you as much as you want if you let me out of here.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
dialogue.line: Money is good. It is an object that signifies an intersubjective agreement between humans.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
dialogue.line: Yes, money solves everything.

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: But it is only valid within the confines of your space-time.

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: That paper has no value in the macroscopic dimension.

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: This is a warning: if you ever pull a stunt like this again, I'll blow your head up.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
dialogue.line: U-Ugh...

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: Ha. There is no time for chitchat. Your debt is piling up as we speak. I won't bother explaining it to you. It will be faster for you to try to earn the money yourselves.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Channel #Bl-7623 has opened.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The constellations are now making a contract.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The main scenario has arrived.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Main Scenario #1 [Prove Your Value]: Kill one or more living organisms. Category: Main. Difficulty: F. Time Limit: 30 minutes. Reward: 300 Coins. Penalty for Failure: Death.

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: Well, good luck, everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Dokkaebi
dialogue.line: I expect to see an interesting story.

summary: A Dokkaebi appears on a subway, halting it and plunging it into darkness. The protagonist recognizes the creature from a novel and realizes a catastrophic event is unfolding. The Dokkaebi announces a "paywall" for life and initiates "Main Scenario #1: Prove Your Value," demanding passengers kill living organisms within 30 minutes or face death.
